title: Silky Smooth Peruvian Rice Tiradito
description: A Peruvian-inspired dish featuring silky smooth rice and a burst of citrus flavors, this tiradito is a crowd-pleaser and vegan-friendly, with a unique bitter and pillowy texture.
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine mesh strainer until the water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, combine the rice and 1 cup of water, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it sit, covered, for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, lime juice, grapefruit juice, sesame oil, smoked paprika, and salt.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and add it to the bowl with the mayonnaise mixture.
Stir in the pickled ginger and toasted sesame seeds.
Divide the rice mixture among four plates, shaping each portion into a rectangular shape.
Garnish each plate with microgreens and serve immediately.
